Farming ringmail
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2020 at 3:01 PM Rating: Decent
zyskyn
Scholar
99 posts
Go to the Warrens, kill kobolds, collect molars, turn into Tiam Khonsir in Erudin paladin guild. Reward is often a piece of ringmail. Vendor diving at the Pally guild vendors should also get you lots.
▲ Page top

One set dropped off of a Darkboned Skeleton in Unrest today.

One Dropped off him in everfrost for me today
▲ Page top
ringmail
QuoteReply
# Oct 06 2002 at 10:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781963162
View User Forum
40 posts
Please please do NOT buy ringmail, do NOT WEAR ringmail-SELL THE RINGMAIL to merchants!! mages need it for concordance research and it can never be found once spotted at a merchant! Why? to attempt to increase research skills, say 5 points? you need 10 NON-STACKABLE items as well as gems, and 5 non-stackable parchement, and even then only for the beza runes (combined with azia to make one rune and increase research skill) Dont wear it, dont buy it, but sell it to merchants whenever you can! Smithed armor is better, and cheaper! chainmail is better! it is so hard to find and almost impossible to track down if you already have 5 of the first ingredients for beza runes!
▲ Page top
